name: BGYO
description:
'''BGYO''' (formerly '''Star Hunt Academy Boys''' or '''SHA Boys''') is a Filipino [[boy band]] formed in 2018 through [[ABS-CBN]]'s ''Star Hunt Academy (SHA)''. The group is composed of five members: Gelo, [[Akira Morishita|Akira]], JL, Mikki, and [[Nate Porcalla|Nate]].

BGYO debuted on January 29, 2021, with their single, "[[The Light (BGYO song)|The Light]]". The group released their second single, "[[He's Into Her (song)|He's Into Her]]", as part of the official soundtrack of the Philippine [[romantic comedy]] series of the [[He's Into Her|same title]]. The song led to the group's first achievement, earning the "Best Theme Song" award at the [[Asian Academy Creative Awards|2021 Asian Academy Creative Awards]]. Their debut album, ''[[The Light (BGYO album)|The Light]]'', achieved record-breaking success, topping [[iTunes]] Philippines' Top 100 albums chart for twelve consecutive days, making it the longest top charting album by a Filipino act on the platform. BGYO's achievements also reached the international stage, with the group featured in [[Grammy Awards|Grammy's]] "The Many Sounds of Asian Pop" [[listicle]] in 2023.
